message.thinking:
We need to produce JSON array with 3 objects. Each object has keys: "question" with one word: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure" depending on question. Provide feedback: text highlighting problems with the text regarding the question, i.e., why the text does not meet criteria of the question. If no problems, briefly highlight strong parts. "complies" boolean true if text complies to given requirements.

We need to evaluate the provided final text. Let's analyze each question.

1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? The text: "Darbs ietver PE failu formāta izpēti, lai iegūtu zināšanas par tā daļām, kuras var izmantot informācijas slēpšanai, zināmo metožu un rīku analīzi, kā arī to darbības principu izpratni. Darbā tiks analizēti tadas metodikas, ka Slack Space (brīvas vietas izmantošana), virknu nomaiņa (izmantojot tādus rīkus, kā Hydan un steg86), kā arī dll injekcijas. Praktiskajā daļā tiks mēģināts slēpt informāciju PE failos, izmantojot izpētītās metodes un rīkus, analizējot to efektivitāti un iespējamo ietekmi uz faila funkcionalitāti."

It does not list main sections or chapters. It describes content but not list of sections. So compliance: false. Feedback: text does not list chapters, only describes content. Provide suggestion: list chapters.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? Since there are no sections listed, cannot describe each. So compliance false. Feedback: text lacks description of each section; it only gives overview. Suggest adding section descriptions.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? The text gives some idea: theoretical part analyzing methods, practical part implementing. But not clear structure. So compliance false. Feedback: structure not clear; need to outline parts, e.g., introduction, literature review, methodology, experiments, conclusion.

Thus all three false. Provide feedback accordingly.

Now produce JSON array with 3 objects. Ensure keys exactly as specified. Provide minimal but adequate feedback. Let's craft.

Also note: The "question" field must be one word: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure". Provide that.

Let's produce.
